prestazioni: Engine swap to a Chrysler RB 440 Magnum (440ci, 7.2L) with a forged crankshaft (Callies 440-5000) and forged pistons (JE 440-261890) for 12.5:1 compression, paired with a Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 292H camshaft (0.544" lift, 244° duration @ 0.050") and ported Edelbrock Performer RPM cylinder heads (2.14" intake/1.81" exhaust valves).

Induction system featuring a Holley Sniper EFI 2x4 setup (1,250 CFM) with a custom-fabricated aluminum intake manifold (designed via Flowmaster dyno testing) and a Paxton Novi 2000 supercharger (8 psi boost, intercooled with a custom Spearco air-to-water intercooler).

Drivetrain upgrades including a Tremec TKO-600 5-speed manual transmission with a McLeod twin-disc clutch (RST 1570), a Ford 9" rear end with 4.11:1 gears (Currie Enterprises nodular iron case), and a Detroit Locker differential. Suspension overhaul with Hotchkis TVS Stage 3 coilovers (adjustable ride height and damping), polygraphite bushings (Energy Suspension), and a Hellwig 7688 front sway bar.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a RareWurks Satellite-specific kit (fiberglass fenders, quarter panels, and rear valance) with 1.5" flares to accommodate 18x9.5" (front) and 18x11" (rear) Billet Specialties Vintec wheels (ET25 offset) wrapped in Mickey Thompson ET Street R tires (275/40R18 front, 315/35R18 rear).

Full custom paint in PPG "Plum Crazy" with a matte black vinyl wrap roof and hood, paired with a Shaker hood scoop (restored original unit) and a custom-fabricated dual-exit exhaust system (3.5" stainless steel, Flowmaster 44 Series mufflers).

Interior overhaul with Recaro SRD front seats (retrimmed in black Alcantara with purple stitching), a custom roll cage (Chassisworks 8-point bolt-in), and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub. Gauges replaced with a Dakota Digital HDX-7000 series cluster (custom-programmed for the 440 Magnum) and a Hurst Competition/Plus shifter.
